title: toxicoscordion exaltatum
intro: Toxicoscordion exaltatum, also known as death camas, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of western North America. Traditionally, the plant's root has been used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of death camas include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with colds, coughs, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Toxicoscordion exaltatum typically involve drying and powdering the root, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, or infusions.
